title: Entry-Level Frontend Developer at DeHaat International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Frontend Developer at DeHaat International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
Join the DeHaat International Enterprises family as a Frontend Developer in Amritsar. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About DeHaat International Enterprises:
DeHaat International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Node.js

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DeHaat International Enterprises!
